text.title: Data Analysis — Requirements Discovery and Quality Assessment Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the business question have a quantifiable answer in existing data?

conclusion.verdict: Run the 5-step pipeline; emit data dictionary + 6-dim quality scoreboard.
Specify instrumentation first (events, source-of-truth contracts); circle back to data analysis after capture.
Hand off to analytics engineer; BA does not own causal inference.
Require DPIA + synthetic environment before any direct exploration.
Use certified metric registry; never recompute a certified metric.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
